free_text: Investigation of 6-Li+16-O and 7-Li+16-O reactions at
low energies.
The data from the publications were used to compare
with present measurements.
The publications contain data for interaction lithium
ions with another targets and useful details of the
experiments.
The fusion cross sections data measured by the
detection of the heavy evaporation residues.
3 megavolts pelletron.
Prompt gamma-rays
Two types of targets were used:  silicon dioxide
targets were self- supporting and vanadium pentoxide
targets were with 200 mugramm/cm**2 gold backing.  At
each bombarding energy three spectra, one with silicon
dioxide, one with vanadium pentoxide and another with a
simple Ta-frame having a hole in place of the target,
were obtained.
See sample
Last checking has been done.
Data table were received from B.Dasmahapatra.
The kinetic energies sum of projectile and
target nucleus in C.-M. System.                       O
- By compiler. Authors' data are presented as function
of lithium kinetic energy in lab.-System.  Original
energy data are saved in MISC-COL.
Hauser-Feshbach Calculation with cross sections
obtained from the detection of evaporation residues.
